hooks.command:
cfg="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$PWD}/.claude/team.config"; if [ -f "$cfg" ]; then printf '=== mARC :: per-repo team.config (channel topic) ===
'; cat "$cfg"; printf '
=== end team.config ===
'; else printf '[mARC] no .claude/team.config in this repo — @techlead will fall back to runtime discovery (gh repo view / gh project list). Add one from docs/team.config.example to pin repo/project facts.
'; fi; exit 0
